Ahead of the 2028 Olympic Games in Los Angeles, the International Olympic Committee banned transgender women from competing in women’s events.

The White House cheered the decision. Here's how it could impact the games: https://t.co/Ysqc1tX3Ny

fullText: A group of bipartisan senators introduced legislation that would require lawmakers and government employees to disclose any bets they place through prediction markets in a bid to prevent officials from profiting on privileged information https://t.co/nObGIt24lc

fullText:
Netflix is hiking its subscription costs again, raising monthly prices by $1 to $2 across its major tiers after it recently backed out of its acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery.
Read more: https://t.co/8OhpyxTqCi
